case_title: JUAN C. VASQUEZ VS. MANUEL CASTILLO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, JUAN C. AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, MANUEL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, JUAN C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, MANUEL $2,977.33 PRINCIPAL, $12.39 INTEREST, $156.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,146.02, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
